publishedAbstract: - Can `CoreDNS` within an OpenShift cluster be configured to restrict `DNS` resolution to a specific, predefined list of allowed `Fully Qualified Domain Names` (FQDNs / Whitelisting)?- Is it possible to implement client-driven security requirements to block or filter external `DNS` resolution directly at the cluster `DNS` level.
publishedTitle: Configuring CoreDNS for FQDN Whitelisting / Filtering in OpenShift
